subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Pipework circulating heated water for food preparation and sanitary purposes must be insulated in accordance with J6D9, including 500 mm along each branch line.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Trace-heated pipework carrying heated water for food preparation and sanitary purposes must be insulated in accordance with J6D9.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A building with gas heated water for food preparation and sanitary purposes must be provided with—

ol.li: reserved electrical capacity sufficient to support future installation of air-source heat pump water heating equipment for food preparation and sanitary purposes assuming a nominal coefficient of performance of 3.25; and

reserved space within the main electrical distribution board comprising at least one empty three-phase circuit breaker slot and 4 DIN rail spaces per 35 kW of water heating capacity labelled to indicate reservation for future installation of heated water supply; and
reserved space in the electrical riser or supply pathway for future water heating equipment, sized in accordance (a); and

reserved plant area with—
space to accommodate heating plant of 7 m² plus 0.04 m²/kW of heating capacity; and
sufficient ventilation to achieve airflow of 115 L/s per kW of heating, with no recirculation of air.

subclause.title: QLD REPLACE SubClause
subclause.p: This sub-clause has deliberately been left blank.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The capacity and space required by (3) must be sufficient to serve the same design load used to specify any gas-powered water heating equipment for food preparation and sanitary purposes.

subclause.title: QLD REPLACE SubClause
subclause.p: This sub-clause has deliberately been left blank.
